perks.summary: SV-6 capstone (P6-T21) — real redeemed milestones settle as bounties (zero-sum); FMV seeded; plan-completion receipt verifies offline. THE LADDER CLOSES
dispute lifecycle (P6-T12) — bond + m-of-n WebAuthn resolution + clawback/forfeit + reputation, all ledgered & zero-sum
Money type + float-ban (P6-T01) — scale-4 HALF_EVEN, float refused, splits exact; 0 float intrusions in infra/settle
FMV manipulation resistance (P6-T11) — 20% adversarial volume moves the trimmed control-capped median <2%; sub-admission provisional; sybils collapsed
signed funded quote (P6-T04) — plan-bound DSSE quote, breakdown sums exact; priced grant needs a funded quote; tampered/unfunded/plan-mismatch refused
settlement engine (P6-T05) — dual-sig+validation:pass+quote-bound → atomic balanced settle, escrow zeroed; mutant receipts (sig stripped / verdict flipped / unbound) rejected
the cws-settle-sim authoring (P6-T18) — storm + manipulate + dispute: zero_sum_exact, index_drift<2%, dispute_lifecycle_complete
reward ledger double-entry (P6-T02) — every posting set balanced; 10k storm globally zero-sum; escrow zero at terminal; balance-root checkpoints
